extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC crashed twice (km 25 and on descent), lost yellow jersey while solo chasing, SCHACHMANN won GC by 52 seconds after DSM rode tempo when Jumbo-Visma emptied.
tactical_patterns: DSM accelerated tempo when Roglic crashed second time, forcing Jumbo domestiques to empty themselves pacing him back through crosswinds.
Roglic caught breakaway with 25m remaining on stage 7 summit finish, revealing excess form that vanished after stage 8 crashes.
Bennett attacked early in green jersey to help teammate Cattaneo on mountain stage, securing sprint points while Roglic absent.
Schachmann defended 2020 title without winning a stage, profiting from GC rival's mechanical misfortune rather than direct attacks.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: crashed twice in stage 8, first crash km 25 caused upper/lower thigh injuries that likely compromised descending for second crash
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: willing to burn green jersey legs in mountain breakaway for teammate tactics, unconventional sprinter sacrifice play
rider_signals.MADER Gino: positive: 24yo U23 Worlds 4th held off yellow jersey Roglic until final 25 meters on 16.3km summit finish
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: DSM had Hindley available to support tempo when Roglic crashed but commentary suggests underutilization
rider_signals.DECLERCQ Tim: neutral: nearly caused Roglic third crash while pacing him back, highlighting risk of using non-climbing domestique on technical descents
